creator: gary@hayers.org
text:
On 22/08/2013 23:25, Matthias Andree wrote:
> Gary, Lowell,
>
> I have taken over the Mailman maintainership for the nonce.
>
> Could you check if the updated and revised port in
> http://people.freebsd.org/~mandree/mailman.tar.xz fixes the "without
> NLS" for you, and let me know what you find?
>
> It leaves the templates/en/ intact.  If that is not sufficient, we may
> need to kill the NLS option and pretend it were always on.

Lowell, Matthias,

All seems to be working here on 10.0-CURRENT r254492
Even htdig is working now which is great.

-- 
Regards,
Gary J. Hayers
gary@hayers.org
